info.DAtuviSezaH: 10.0501 prAtipadikAt DAtvarTe bahulamizWavacca iti gaRasUtreRa atra 'suKa' iti prAtipadikameva svArTe kriyAM dyotayitum DAtusaMjYAM gfhRAti  ataSca atra DAtvarTaH api 'tatkriyAyAm' iti dIyate
info.english_meaning: to make happy to be happy
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: “ prAtipadikAt DAtvarTe bahulamizWavacca ' (ga.sU. curAdO) ityasya vivaraRarUpoyaM DAtuH  suKaduHKaSabdayoH ' tat karoti tadAcazwe tenAkrAmati ' (ga.sU.curAdO) ityetezu arTezu ' Ric ' Bavati  ' sanAdyantAH DAtavaH ' (3.1.32) iti DAtusaMjYA “ iti kfdantarUpamAlA  “ prAtipadikAt DAtvarTe …' ityeva sidDe anayoH pAWaH sopasargAt pratyayArTam ityeke  suKaduHKAByAM tatkriyAyAmeva Ric syAt  na tu Acazwe ityasminnarTe ityetadarTaH pAWaH ityanye “ iti tattvaboDinI  atra tatkriyA = suKanam  suKAnukUlaH - vyApAraH  ' tatkriyA = tadanuBavaH ' iti DAtukAvyavyAKyAne (3.62)

participles.neuter: susuKayizAmbaBUvat, susuKayizAmbaBUvad, susuKayizAmAsivat, susuKayizAmAsivad, susuKayizAYcakfvat, susuKayizAYcakfvad
suKayAmbaBUvat, suKayAmbaBUvad, suKayAmAsivat, suKayAmAsivad, suKayAYcakfvat, suKayAYcakfvad
